summary.brief: Kentico Xperience CMS: 2 CVEs added to CISA KEV today. · Adobe Bridge — exploitation likelihood rose sharply (EPSS 8.3% → 26% · rising (+18%)). · 10 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.
bullets: Kentico Xperience CMS: 2 CVEs added to CISA KEV today.
Adobe Bridge — exploitation likelihood rose sharply (EPSS 8.3% → 26% · rising (+18%)).
10 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.

digest.description: The issue was addressed with improved bounds checks. This issue is fixed in tvOS 15.6, watchOS 8.7, iOS 15.6 and iPadOS 15.6, macOS Monterey 12.5, Safari 15.6. Processing web content may lead to arbitrary code execution.
digest.title: Apple Multiple Products Unspecified Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

descriptions.value: The issue was addressed with improved bounds checks. This issue is fixed in tvOS 15.6, watchOS 8.7, iOS 15.6 and iPadOS 15.6, macOS Monterey 12.5, Safari 15.6. Processing web content may lead to arbitrary code execution.

El problema se solucionó con comprobaciones de límites mejoradas. Este problema se ha solucionado en tvOS 15.6, watchOS 8.7, iOS 15.6, iPadOS 15.6, macOS Monterey 12.5 and Safari 15.6. El procesamiento de contenido web puede dar lugar a la ejecución de código arbitrario.

digest.description: Adobe Bridge versions 10.0 have a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution.
digest.title: adobe bridge RCE

descriptions.value: Adobe Bridge versions 10.0 have a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution.
Adobe Bridge versión 10.0, presenta una vulnerabilidad de desbordamiento del búfer en la región heap de la memoria. Una explotación con éxito podría conllevar a una ejecución de código arbitraria.

digest.description: Lack of application manifest sanitation could lead to potential stored XSS.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.
digest.title: azure-access blu-ic2_firmware cross-site scripting

descriptions.value: Lack of application manifest sanitation could lead to potential stored XSS.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

digest.description: GeoVision embedded IP devices, confirmed on GV-BX1500 and GV-MFD1501, contain a remote command injection vulnerability via /PictureCatch.cgi that enables an attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the device. The vulnerable models have been declared end-of-life (EOL) by the vendor. VulnCheck has observed this vulnerability being exploited in the wild as of 2025-10-19 08:55:13.141502 UTC.
digest.title: GeoVision embedded IP devices, confirmed on GV-BX1500 and GV-MFD1501, contain a remote command injection vulnerability via /PictureCatch....

descriptions.value: GeoVision embedded IP devices, confirmed on GV-BX1500 and GV-MFD1501, contain a remote command injection vulnerability via /PictureCatch.cgi that enables an attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the device. The vulnerable models have been declared end-of-life (EOL) by the vendor. VulnCheck has observed this vulnerability being exploited in the wild as of 2025-10-19 08:55:13.141502 UTC.

digest.description:
NetBird VPN when installed using vendor's provided script failed to remove or change default password of an admin account created by ZITADEL.
This issue affects instances installed using vendor's provided script. This issue may affect instances created with Docker if the default password was not changed nor the user was removed.

This issue has been fixed in version 0.57.0
digest.title: NetBird VPN when installed using vendor's provided script failed to remove or change default password of an admin account created by ZITA...

descriptions.value:
NetBird VPN when installed using vendor's provided script failed to remove or change default password of an admin account created by ZITADEL.
This issue affects instances installed using vendor's provided script. This issue may affect instances created with Docker if the default password was not changed nor the user was removed.

This issue has been fixed in version 0.57.0

digest.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability in Kentico Xperience allows authentication bypass via the Staging Sync Server password handling of empty SHA1 usernames in digest authentication. Authentication bypass allows an attacker to control administrative objects.This issue affects Xperience through 13.0.172.
digest.title: Kentico Xperience CMS Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Kentico Xperience CMS Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel Vulnerability

descriptions.value: An authentication bypass vulnerability in Kentico Xperience allows authentication bypass via the Staging Sync Server password handling of empty SHA1 usernames in digest authentication. Authentication bypass allows an attacker to control administrative objects.This issue affects Xperience through 13.0.172.

Una vulnerabilidad de omisión de autenticación en Kentico Xperience permite omitir la autenticación mediante la gestión de contraseñas del servidor de sincronización de pruebas de nombres de usuario SHA1 vacíos en la autenticación implícita. Esta omisión de autenticación permite a un atacante controlar objetos administrativos. Este problema afecta a Xperience hasta la versión 13.0.172.

digest.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability in Kentico Xperience allows authentication bypass via the Staging Sync Server component password handling for the server defined None type. Authentication bypass allows an attacker to control administrative objects.This issue affects Xperience through 13.0.178.
digest.title: Kentico Xperience CMS Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Kentico Xperience CMS Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel Vulnerability

descriptions.value: An authentication bypass vulnerability in Kentico Xperience allows authentication bypass via the Staging Sync Server component password handling for the server defined None type. Authentication bypass allows an attacker to control administrative objects.This issue affects Xperience through 13.0.178.

Una vulnerabilidad de omisión de autenticación en Kentico Xperience permite omitir la autenticación mediante la gestión de contraseñas del componente Staging Sync Server para el tipo "Ninguno" definido por el servidor. Esta omisión permite a un atacante controlar objetos administrativos. Este problema afecta a Xperience hasta la versión 13.0.178.

digest.description: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in the upload file function of Galaxy Software Services Corporation Vitals ESP Forum Module through 1.3 version allows remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary system commands via a malicious file.
digest.title: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in the upload file function of Galaxy Software Services Corporation Vita...

descriptions.value: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in the upload file function of Galaxy Software Services Corporation Vitals ESP Forum Module through 1.3 version allows remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary system commands via a malicious file.

digest.description: Improper access control in Windows SMB allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
digest.title: Microsoft Windows SMB Client Improper Access Control Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows SMB Client Improper Access Control Vulnerability

descriptions.value: Improper access control in Windows SMB allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
Un control de acceso inadecuado en Windows SMB permite que un atacante autorizado eleve privilegios en una red.

digest.description: A SQL Injection vulnerability has been found in Epsilon RH by Grupo Castilla. This vulnerability allows an attacker to retrieve, create, update and delete database via sending a POST request using the parameter ‘sEstadoUsr’ in ‘/epsilonnetws/WSAvisos.asmx’.
digest.title: A SQL Injection vulnerability has been found in Epsilon RH by Grupo Castilla.

descriptions.value: A SQL Injection vulnerability has been found in Epsilon RH by Grupo Castilla. This vulnerability allows an attacker to retrieve, create, update and delete database via sending a POST request using the parameter ‘sEstadoUsr’ in ‘/epsilonnetws/WSAvisos.asmx’.

digest.description: An issue was discovered in Dolby UDC 4.5 through 4.13. A crash of the DD+ decoder process can occur when a malformed DD+ bitstream is processed. When Evolution data is processed by evo_priv.c from the DD+ bitstream, the decoder writes that data into a buffer. The length calculation for a write can overflow due to an integer wraparound. This can lead to the allocated buffer being too small, and the out-of-bounds check of the subsequent write to be ineffective, leading to an out-of-bounds write.
digest.title: An issue was discovered in Dolby UDC 4.5 through 4.13.

descriptions.value: An issue was discovered in Dolby UDC 4.5 through 4.13. A crash of the DD+ decoder process can occur when a malformed DD+ bitstream is processed. When Evolution data is processed by evo_priv.c from the DD+ bitstream, the decoder writes that data into a buffer. The length calculation for a write can overflow due to an integer wraparound. This can lead to the allocated buffer being too small, and the out-of-bounds check of the subsequent write to be ineffective, leading to an out-of-bounds write.

digest.description: Hatching Triage Sandbox Windows 10 build 2004 (2025-08-14) and Windows 10 LTSC 2021(2025-08-14) contains a vulnerability in its Windows behavioral analysis engine that allows a submitted malware sample to evade detection and cause denial-of-analysis. The vulnerability is triggered when a sample recursively spawns a large number of child processes, generating high log volume and exhausting system resources. As a result, key malicious behavior, including PowerShell execution and reverse shell activity, may not be recorded or reported, misleading analysts and compromising the integrity and availability of sandboxed analysis results.
digest.title: Hatching Triage Sandbox Windows 10 build 2004 (2025-08-14) and Windows 10 LTSC 2021(2025-08-14) contains a vulnerability in its Windows b...

descriptions.value: Hatching Triage Sandbox Windows 10 build 2004 (2025-08-14) and Windows 10 LTSC 2021(2025-08-14) contains a vulnerability in its Windows behavioral analysis engine that allows a submitted malware sample to evade detection and cause denial-of-analysis. The vulnerability is triggered when a sample recursively spawns a large number of child processes, generating high log volume and exhausting system resources. As a result, key malicious behavior, including PowerShell execution and reverse shell activity, may not be recorded or reported, misleading analysts and compromising the integrity and availability of sandboxed analysis results.

digest.description: SQL Injection vulnerability exists in Bhabishya-123 E-commerce 1.0, specifically within the signup.inc.php endpoint. The application directly incorporates unsanitized user inputs into SQL queries, allowing unauthenticated attackers to bypass authentication and gain full access.
digest.title: SQL Injection vulnerability exists in Bhabishya-123 E-commerce 1.0, specifically within the signup.inc.php endpoint.

descriptions.value: SQL Injection vulnerability exists in Bhabishya-123 E-commerce 1.0, specifically within the signup.inc.php endpoint. The application directly incorporates unsanitized user inputs into SQL queries, allowing unauthenticated attackers to bypass authentication and gain full access.

digest.description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Configurator product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Runtime UI).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.14. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Configurator.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle Configurator accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 7.5 (Confidentiality impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N).
digest.title: Oracle E-Business Suite Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Oracle E-Business Suite Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability

descriptions.value: Vulnerability in the Oracle Configurator product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Runtime UI).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.14. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Configurator.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle Configurator accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 7.5 (Confidentiality impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N).

digest.description: Lanscope Endpoint Manager (On-Premises) (Client program (MR) and Detection agent (DA)) improperly verifies the origin of incoming requests, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending specially crafted packets.
digest.title: Motex LANSCOPE Endpoint Manager Improper Verification of Source of a Communication Channel Vulnerability
